blocks.content: After drills, Coach Briggs put us in one group. All sixty of us standing on the field, the sun already going down.

blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: List goes up Monday 7am. Main entrance. If your name's on it, be at practice Monday afternoon. If it isn't — come see me. Don't let somebody else tell you what I think of you.
He walked back to the field house. No speech. No inspiration. Just information.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I do though. I know what I saw out there. You made adjustments on the second rep. That's the thing coaches look for — not perfection, coachability. You showed him that.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh. Did you see my routes?
I did know. There was never a question about Jonathan. There was only ever a question about whether I'd be standing next to him or watching from somewhere else.

options.label: "I have no idea. Could go either way."
"I don't want to think about it until Monday."
